ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bus_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the bus mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bus mode */,
  "default_timing_mode" INTEGER /* Default timing mode for this bus mode */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the bus mode */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the bus mode was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the bus mode */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the bus mode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_modes" (
  "timing_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing mode */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus mode this timing mode belongs to */,
  "bit_range" TEXT /* Bit range for this timing mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timing mode */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the timing mode */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the timing mode */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the timing mode */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the timing mode was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the timing mode */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the timing mode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timing_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_modes_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES bus_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capabilities" (
  "capability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capability */,
  "capability_name" TEXT /* Name of the capability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the capability */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the capability */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the capability was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the capability */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the capability was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "controller_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus mode used in the configuration */,
  "capability_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the capability supported by the configuration */,
  "sdr_timing_mode" INTEGER /* SDR timing mode for the configuration */,
  "ddr_timing_mode" INTEGER /* NV-DDR timing mode for the configuration */,
  "ddr2_timing_mode" INTEGER /* NV-DDR2 timing mode for the configuration */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_controller_configurations_capability_id FOREIGN KEY ("capability_id") REFERENCES capabilities ("capability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_controller_configurations_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES bus_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this metric is for */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the metric */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES controller_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this result is for */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the simulation */,
  "date_simulated" TEXT /* Date the simulation was conducted */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the simulation result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation result was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the simulation result */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES controller_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the access log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the access log */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES controller_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this document is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the document */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES controller_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the version */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES controller_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this issue is related to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Person who reported the issue */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the issue */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES controller_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue this comment is related to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_by" TEXT /* Person who commented */,
  "date_commented" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the comment */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue this resolution is for */,
  "resolution_text" TEXT /* Text describing the resolution */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Person who resolved the issue */,
  "date_resolved" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the resolution */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the resolution was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the resolution */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the resolution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_resolutions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system requirement */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this requirement is for */,
  "requirement_text" TEXT /* Text describing the system requirement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the requirement (e.g., met, unmet) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the requirement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the requirement was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the requirement */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_requirements_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES controller_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this result is for */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the test */,
  "date_tested" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the test result */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES controller_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change request */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this request is for */,
  "request_text" TEXT /* Text describing the change request */,
  "requested_by" TEXT /* Person who requested the change */,
  "date_requested" TEXT /* Date the change was requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., approved, denied) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the change request */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the change request was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the change request */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the change request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES controller_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this trail is for */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the audit trail */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the audit trail was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the audit trail */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the audit trail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES controller_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration this notification is for */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the notification */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES controller_configurations ("config_id")
)
